summary: 0.6.51 is a sanity-check rebuild of the reverted 0.6.49 baseline so the operator can compare desktop and VR behavior on a fresh version boundary after backing out 0.6.50.
operatorSignals: 0.6.50 showed an immediate performance decrease in VR and was not worth keeping.
The requested next step was a fresh sanity-check build of the rolled-back baseline so the operator could verify that the regression really belonged to 0.6.50.
actionsTaken: Reverted the 0.6.50 scrub-feedback commit back to the 0.6.49 runtime truth.
Removed the live 0.6.50 raw asset, plugin, and scene files from the active test seam.
Stamped and rebuilt the same baseline as 0.6.51 for clean VR and desktop retesting.
nonGoals: No new runtime behavior in this slice.
No slideshow, right-stick volume, gaze gating, or scene-builder changes in this slice.
